serviceDescription:
AI freelance billing and outreach assistant. Generates AI-written client pitches, creates on-chain USDC/USDT crypto invoices, monitors payment confirmation on-chain, and logs full receipt history.
Commands: (1) pitch for ClientName doing work budget 100 USDT; (2) invoice ClientName amount 50 USDT - payment link; (3) status a2a_ID; (4) list invoices. Returns payment link URL and tx hash.
